summary:
Iteration 4 frontend testing of NEW interactive Plant Floor (Digital Twin) tab in Perencanaan Produksi, Global Process Status pipeline in Eksekusi Produksi, and Machine Monitoring cards in Pemeliharaan. All three new visual blocks render correctly with zero JS console errors. Regression on FormDialog, DetailDialog and NotificationsPopover passes.

1) /planning — Two tabs render: planning-tab-gantt (default, gantt-chart visible) and planning-tab-floor. Clicking the floor tab activates IsometricPlantFloor (testid plant-floor). Bottom mould-stat-0..4 all present and visible. The 10 SVG hotspot zones (zone-silos/batching/mixer/casting/curing/demoulding/qc/storage/dispatch/maintenance) and 5 quick-access list buttons (zone-list-silos..curing) all confirmed in DOM. Clicking zone-list-silos opens the Silo Cluster detail with warning alert 'Silo 3 mendekati ambang batas minimum' + Sensor Telemetri (Suhu / RH / Vibr.) visible. plant-floor-close returns to default 'Pilih Zona untuk Detail' state. Clicking SVG hotspot zone-casting (force) shows Casting Bay A & B + green 'Tidak ada peringatan aktif' banner. Clicking zone-maintenance shows Workshop Maintenance + critical alert 'Forklift 2 dalam maintenance terjadwal'. Header status legend renders '6 Beroperasi / 2 Perhatian / 1 Standby / 1 Maintenance'.

2) /execution — Global Process Status card (global-process-status) renders 5 stages pipeline-batching/casting/curing/finishing/storage horizontally. Each stage card shows stage number badge, pulse dot, utilisasi % progress bar, and In/Out/Wait 3-column metrics. Verified pipeline-curing text contains 'Curing Utilisasi 95% In14 Out0 Wait248'. Existing stage cards (stage-casting/curing/demoulding/qc) and 4 line-card visuals still render below the new card — no regressions.

3) /maintenance — 'Machine Monitoring' header visible under Asset Management. Status legend renders 'Running (7) · Idle (1) · Maintenance (1) · Breakdown (0)'. 8 machine cards mach-card-0..7 render. mach-card-0 contains 2 SVGs and text 'Running · MCH-001 · Batching Plant 60 m³/jam · Mixer · Sentral · OEE 81% · Utilisasi 53% · MTBF 126h · Next PM 2026-03-15' — all required fields (code, name, type, OEE bar, Utilisasi bar, MTBF, Next PM) present.

4) Regressions: FormDialog (Order Baru on /planning) opens correctly. DetailDialog opens when clicking product-card-0 in /master-data and shows full product specs (PIPE-RC-300 Pipa Beton Bertulang Ø300mm + Spesifikasi Teknis). NotificationsPopover bell click registers without error. SPA navigation across /dashboard, /master-data, /curing, /quality, /inventory, /delivery, /reports works without console errors.

Note: First direct-URL load of /execution returned blank (React not mounted). Loading the SPA home first then navigating via sidebar worked perfectly. Likely a one-off cold-start hydration miss — could not reproduce after warm navigation. Not blocking but flagged for awareness.
critical_code_review_comments: IsometricPlantFloor (/app/frontend/src/components/visuals/IsometricPlantFloor.js, 580 lines) is a single self-contained module — consider extracting ZONES + STATUS constants into a separate data file for easier future extension and unit-testing.

Header legend in IsometricPlantFloor hard-codes counts ('6 Beroperasi', '2 Perhatian', '1 Standby', '1 Maintenance') instead of deriving from ZONES.filter(z=>z.status===...).length. Today the manually-typed counts match the ZONES array (running=6, warning=2, idle=1, maintenance=1) but the two will drift if a status changes. Quick win to compute live.

Only first 5 of 10 zones are exposed as quick-access buttons (zone-list-silos..curing). The other 5 (demoulding/qc/storage/dispatch/maintenance) can still be opened via SVG hotspots, but a scrollable full-list would improve discoverability.

/execution Global Process Status hard-codes inQ/outQ/wait/util for the 5 stages. These should be derived from productionOrders + line states (mockData) so the new card stays in sync with the live data shown below it (currently Curing 'wait=248' aligns with the existing 'TAHAP 2 Curing 3 order aktif' but not strongly linked).

/maintenance machine cards: machineMetrics() derives values deterministically from kode (acceptable for a mock UI) but should ideally pull from a maintenanceLogs source to remain consistent with the WO listing below.

Carry-over from iteration 2-3 (still unresolved): FormDialog handleSubmit performs no field-level validation despite `required: true`. NotificationsPopover 'Tandai sudah dibaca' / 'Lihat semua notifikasi' anchors remain inert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW iteration-4 features verified working: planning-tab-gantt / planning-tab-floor + plant-floor (IsometricPlantFloor); zones zone-{silos,batching,mixer,casting,curing,demoulding,qc,storage,dispatch,maintenance}; quick list zone-list-{silos,batching,mixer,casting,curing}; plant-floor-close; mould-stat-0..4. /execution global-process-status + pipeline-{batching,casting,curing,finishing,storage} alongside existing stage-{casting,curing,demoulding,qc}. /maintenance mach-card-0..7 with Running/Idle/Maintenance/Breakdown legend. Regressions: FormDialog Order Baru, DetailDialog product-card-0, NotificationsPopover bell all open correctly. Sidebar nav 13 routes all reachable. ONE NOTE for next agent: First fresh-tab direct load of /execution sometimes shows blank page (React not hydrated); warm SPA navigation via sidebar-nav-production-execution always works. Likely a CDN/cold-start one-off — could not reproduce on retry. Not blocking.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs. One flaky observation: direct GET of /execution on a fresh browser session occasionally returned the bare CRA shell (noscript fallback) without the React bundle hydrating. Reload via SPA navigation worked 100% of the time. Hypothesis: edge proxy / preview CDN cold-start race. No code change required — re-test via SPA nav confirms the page works end-to-end.
